# `nise bootstrap dotfiles`

- **Usage**: `nise bootstrap dotfiles <SUBCOMMAND>`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/bootstrap/mod.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/bootstrap/mod.rs)

Manage dotfiles from `[dotfiles]`

## Subcommands

- [`nise bootstrap dotfiles apply [FLAGS] [TARGET]…`](/cli/bootstrap/dotfiles/apply.md)
- [`nise bootstrap dotfiles status [-J --json] [--missing] [TARGET]…`](/cli/bootstrap/dotfiles/status.md)
